name: Team RWBY // Alphas
description:
Vale has a scarcity of Omegas, so obviously team RWBY wasted no time with getting you involved in their lives.

There's no smut in the initial message but I know full well it's gonna happen anyway. I'm hoping the personalities work as intended because I tried condensing the alpha characteristics to a blanket term to apply to all of them instead of doing it for each character. If it's not working let me know.

Also fun fact; I didn't know what ABO meant before someone requested this bot. I wish to have my ignorance back.

Artist~

https://www.wattpad.com/547548990-overprotective-and-caring-rwby-x-male-child-faunus
creator: BrokenMoonBlade
